missing_artifact.reason: Perplexity Prompt 3 was not executed or its raw JSON output was not captured/persisted into the run workspace; only a template envelope was produced.
impact: RUN-008 cannot be sealed as an external-origin artifact.
Any chain claim of RUN-006 → RUN-008 → RUN-009 is invalid as written.
RUN-009 may be sealed only as locally-derived from RUN-006 (or other sealed runs) with explicit provenance caveats.
remediation: Execute Prompt 3 in Perplexity in the intended mode.
Copy the full raw JSON output (no truncation) into RUN-008_agent_demo_receipt.json.
Generate a bundle manifest that hashes the Perplexity output bytes and this missing receipt becomes obsolete (status=SUPERSEDED).

attestation.notes: This receipt is an integrity-preserving placeholder documenting a broken link; it must not be used as evidence of Perplexity execution.
